param_conventions: activate_project: --project. find_symbol: --name_path_pattern (NOT --name_path), include_body=false for header-only. find_referencing_symbols: --name_path + --relative_path (FILE, not dir). search_for_pattern: --substring_pattern (literal). Use JSON stdin pipe with '.' sentinel for multi-param.
gotchas: Bare receiver-method names return [] from find_symbol - must qualify as '(*Type).method'. get_symbols_overview reveals the qualified form. No tool changes Runs 4-8 (23 tools stable). find_symbol can take 70s+ when name_path_pattern matches widely - prefer Grep for simple name lookups; reserve find_symbol for cases that need kind filtering or body location. find_symbol REQUIRES name_path_pattern not name_path (validation error otherwise).
